translation.literal_translation: If one says enjoyment would result, no - because of distinction. (8)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.8: bhoga does not accrue to Brahman despite all-pervasiveness/non-duality claims, due to decisive jiva-Ishvara distinction at relevant level.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra compression of the bhoga-transfer refutation.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S02 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit upadhi/vyavahara terminology and atta-grahana technical choices in records 1.2.016-1.2.022.
